question: According to the chart data labels, which statement about regional sales share is correct?

options.A: Central accounts for more than 10% of the market.
options.B: South has a larger market share than West.
options.C: North has a larger market share than East.
options.D: East and West have about the same market share.

explanation: From the labels, South has the highest share (58%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking South is largest when relying on visual comparison.
